description: Refactor the 'flight-scheduler' Maven project to use the modern Java Time API (java.time) instead of legacy java.util.Date and java.util.Calendar classes, which are thread-unsafe and difficult to maintain. Update 'src/main/java/com/airlines/model/Flight.java' to use 'java.time.LocalDateTime' for departure and arrival times and 'src/main/java/com/airlines/service/FlightScheduler.java' to perform time calculations using LocalDateTime methods. Ensure the project compiles and all tests in 'src/test/java/com/airlines/service/FlightSchedulerTest.java' pass after the refactoring.
